title: nautilocalyx biserrulatus
intro: Nautilocalyx biserrulatus, also known as the biserrulate nautilocalyx, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nautilocalyx biserrulatus include the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
